title: Conquest of Hunterra Modpack Compat pack
description: A resourcepack for the mod pack "Conquest of Hunterra"
body:
This resourcepack is meant to give support for mods used in the Conquest Of Hunterra modpack.

Mods such as:

Epic knights

Epic knights addon

Farmers delight

brewin and chewin

smallships

Create Interiors

Create steam and rails

Create Numismatics

Create Bells & Whistles

Create Cards

Create Crafts & Additions

and more to come!
